overview.description: The Volatility Shares 2x Cardano ETF (CRDX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long ada, short usd currency. The fund offers 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Cardano (ADA), using near-term futures and ADA-related instruments. ADA is the native token of the Cardano network. CRDX was launched on Apr 1, 2026 and is issued by Volatility Shares.
infoTable: ADA/USD Exchange Rate - Benchmark Price Return
